summary: Channel Manager 9-Collection Data Model - Full Testing Complete. Backend: 29/29 tests pass (100%). Frontend: Dashboard loads with all 6 tabs (Connections, Room Mappings, Rate Mappings, Lineage, Raw Events, Reconciliation). All CRUD operations verified. Provider enum validation working (hotelrunner/exely only). Duplicate detection returns 409. Activate/Delete buttons functional.
critical_code_review_comments: data_model.py: Clean 9-collection model with proper Pydantic models, ConnectorProvider enum correctly limits to hotelrunner/exely
unified_repository.py: All CRUD operations properly exclude _id, tenant isolation enforced on all queries
model_router.py: REST endpoints well-structured, proper validation for provider enum, duplicate detection via 409 conflict
DataModelDashboard.jsx: All interactive elements have data-testid attributes, tabs work correctly, Activate/Delete buttons functional
GET /lineage/stats works correctly (no routing conflict with /lineage/{lineage_id})
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_PROP_001 connections for hotelrunner and exely, room mapping TEST_STD, rate mapping TEST_BAR, reconciliation cases - all cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: 9-Collection Data Model fully implemented and tested. All 27 API endpoints working: schema, connections CRUD + activate/pause, room-mappings CRUD, rate-plan-mappings CRUD, raw-events list, lineage list + stats, reconciliation cases CRUD + resolve/dismiss + summary. Frontend DataModelDashboard at /data-model shows all collections with working tabs and action buttons. Provider enum strictly enforces hotelrunner|exely only. Existing production data: 2 connections (prop-001), 1 room mapping, 1 rate mapping, 1 reconciliation case.
mocked_apis_note: No mocked APIs - all endpoints are real MongoDB-backed CRUD operations

backend_api_tests: TestProviderConnectionsCRUD: create_connection_hotelrunner, create_connection_exely, reject_invalid_provider_channex, reject_invalid_provider_siteminder, list_connections, get_single_connection_masked_credentials, duplicate_connection_409, activate_connection, pause_connection, update_connection - ALL PASSED
TestRoomMappingsCRUD: create_room_mapping, create_room_mapping_invalid_provider, list_room_mappings, delete_room_mapping - ALL PASSED
TestRatePlanMappingsCRUD: create_rate_plan_mapping, list_rate_plan_mappings, delete_rate_plan_mapping - ALL PASSED
TestRawEventsAndLineage: list_raw_events, list_lineage, lineage_stats_endpoint - ALL PASSED
TestReconciliationCases: create_reconciliation_case, list_open_cases, get_single_case, reconciliation_summary, resolve_case, dismiss_case - ALL PASSED
